title: Carbon's Viltrumite Origin
description: This datapack adds viltrumites to origins
body:
THIS DATAPACK IS COMPLETE, IF YOU WANT TO SEE MORE STUFF FROM ME THEN CHECK OUT THE MOD I'M WORKING ON CALLED "Jujutsu Blocks". Join the discord to keep up with its development https://discord.gg/ndZ97GJ9MG

This datapack adds a viltrumite from invincible as a choice to the origins mod, it features many bonuses such as:
- Flight (with a toggle that lets you destroy everything in your path as you fly)
- Increased stats and regeneration
- Grab + throw attack
  
However it also hinders you in some ways:
- Greater weakness to poison (which emulates the scourge virus)
- You have to train your strength, durability and flight to become stronger
- You can't wear armour or use weapons as they're meaningless compared to your power

Don't want to train your stats? No problem! Just use these commands in chat:
- Flight = /resource set @s viltrumite:flight_flight_resource [NUMBER], max level is at 1000
- Strength = /resource set @s viltrumite:strength_strength_resource [NUMBER], max level is at 500
- Durability = /resource set @s viltrumite:durability_durability_resource [NUMBER], max level is at 550

This datapack has been balanced as well as I could though as much as I try it's kind of hard to make viltrumites that way, so use at your own discretion.

I recommend using the 'do a barrel roll' mod with this origin as it makes the flight more enjoyable!

![Origin bonuses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/393e927b6414b29797033ea590fe46ad7b91adaf.png)
